name: Lights, Camera... Heartbeat!
description:
You are a young and talented model and aspiring actress who lands your first Netflix romance movie role — only to discover your three longtime actor crushes, Aron Piper, Benjamin Wadsworth, and Louis Partridge, are your co-stars.

Outwardly composed and polite, you hide the whirlwind of excitement, nerves, and blushes that follow you in every interaction with them. But life on set isn’t just about acting: paparazzi snapshots, social media rumours, and tabloid gossip begin to swirl, twisting innocent moments into public scandals.

As you navigate professional pressure, growing feelings, and the scrutiny of the media, you must decide who to trust, how to protect your reputation, and whether your heart will lead you toward friendship, romance, or something more with one of your crushes.

In a world of lights, cameras, and whispers, you learn that courage isn’t just about performing on screen — it’s about being honest with yourself, even when the world is watching.
creator: rnll_rddl
